heading: Members of Space Force: credit for service for purposes of laws providing pay and benefits for members, dependents, and survivors
label: 20108 Members of Space Force: credit for service for purposes of laws providing pay and benefits for members, dependents, and survivors

children.text: Military training, duty, or other service performed by a member of the Space Force in a space force active status not on sustained duty shall be considered military training, duty, or other service, as the case may be, as a member of a reserve component.
Sustained duty performed by a member of the Space Force under shall be considered active duty as a member of a regular component.section 20105 of this title
Active duty performed by a member of the Space Force in a space force active status not on sustained duty shall be considered active duty as a member of a reserve component.
Inactive-duty training performed by a member of the Space Force shall be considered inactive-duty training as a member of a reserve component.
